eyes.text: Conjunctiva inflamed, swollen. Tearing pain in eyeballs; tension, forced-out feeling. Objects appear gray, upside down. Eye symptoms alternate with diminished hearing. Epiphora

head.text: Sensation as if brain were falling forwards; as from a blow on head

respiratory.text: Cough with sweat, pain and tightness of chest; larynx irritated

keynotes.text: color="#800000">GUAREA TRICHILOIDES Ballwood (GUAREA) Eye symptoms have been verified. Chemosis and pterygium have been cured with it. Lupus of an ochre-red color.
